# Route95 Mobile Car Detailing

> Professional mobile car detailing services in Fort Lauderdale, Florida. We bring the detail shop to your driveway.

## About

Route95 Mobile Car Detailing LLC provides professional mobile auto detailing services across Fort Lauderdale, Pompano Beach, Dania Beach, and Hollywood, Florida. Founded by Gustavo Moya and Hazel Santillana, we specialize in convenient, high-quality detailing at your location.

## Services

- [Car Detailing Services](https://route95mobilecardetailing.com/car-detailing-services-fort-lauderdale/): Full exterior and interior detailing packages
- [Hand Wash](https://route95mobilecardetailing.com/hand-wash-fort-lauderdale/): Professional hand wash with premium products
- [Interior Car Detailing](https://route95mobilecardetailing.com/interior-car-detailing-fort-lauderdale/): Deep interior cleaning, vacuuming, dashboard, leather care
- [Car Waxing](https://route95mobilecardetailing.com/car-waxing-fort-lauderdale/): Paint protection with premium wax application
- [Engine Bay Cleaning](https://route95mobilecardetailing.com/engine-bay-cleaning-fort-lauderdale/): Safe engine degreasing and detailing
- [Leather Cleaning & Conditioning](https://route95mobilecardetailing.com/leather-cleaning-fort-lauderdale/): Leather restoration and protection
- [Odor Removal](https://route95mobilecardetailing.com/odor-removal-fort-lauderdale/): Professional odor elimination including smoke
- [Pet Hair Removal](https://route95mobilecardetailing.com/pet-hair-removal-fort-lauderdale/): Specialized pet hair extraction
- [Steam Cleaning](https://route95mobilecardetailing.com/steam-cleaning-fort-lauderdale/): Chemical-free deep sanitization
- [Fleet Detailing](https://route95mobilecardetailing.com/fleet-detailing-fort-lauderdale/): Commercial fleet maintenance programs
- [Ceramic Coating & Paint Correction](https://route95mobilecardetailing.com/premium-refresh-fort-lauderdale/): Premium paint restoration

## Service Packages

- **Quick Wash**: Exterior hand wash, tire dressing, window cleaning
- **Fresh Start**: Interior vacuuming, dashboard wipe, window cleaning
- **Complete Clean**: Full exterior and interior detailing
- **Premium Refresh**: Paint correction, ceramic coating, full detail

## Service Area

Fort Lauderdale, Pompano Beach, Dania Beach, and Hollywood, Florida. Mobile service — we come to your home or office.

## Contact

- Phone: (754) 215-2272
- Website: https://route95mobilecardetailing.com
- Email: via contact form on website

## Languages

English, Español (Spanish)

## Pricing

Starting at competitive rates. See [pricing page](https://route95mobilecardetailing.com/mobile-car-detailing-prices-fort-lauderdale/) for package details.
